doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: It presents specific “HUD” and co-issuance details plus definitive legal consequences that are not verifiable and appear inconsistent with typical Illinois/HUD tenant-notice practice.
response_turn1:
